segment.source: Renders a vertical timeline of numbered marker dots, each item a card with a step or date label, title, rich-text description, and optional link. Use it for: process descriptions, project phases, application or onboarding steps, dated event sequences, roadmaps. Prefer 'Company History Timeline' for founding-to-today company milestones, 'How-to Steps' for instructions with HowTo schema, and 'Numbered Feature Steps' for feature walkthroughs.
